---
on:
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  checks: read
  copilot-requests: write

engine: 
  id: copilot

safe-outputs:
  create-check-run:
    name: "copilot-safe-output-check-run"
    # min: 1
    samples:
      - conclusion: "success"
        title: "Copilot Check Run"
        summary: "Check run created by Copilot safe output"
        text: "This check run was generated by the deterministic sample replay path."
---

Create a successful `create_check_run` safe output with title "Copilot Check Run", summary "Check run created by Copilot safe output", and supporting text "This check run was generated by the deterministic sample replay path.".
